output:
CVE-2023-51751 is a vulnerability in ScaleFusion 10.5.2 that fails to properly restrict users to the intended Edge application, allowing them to bypass security by using the Alt-F4 key combination. This flaw is resolved in version 10.5.7, with updates preventing the file explorer from being launched in both Agent-based Multi-App and Single App Kiosk mode.

The vulnerability is associated with the MITRE ATT&CK Technique T1203, although specific CWE information is noted as unavailable (NVD-CWE-noinfo). The severity of this security issue is classified as MEDIUM, potentially allowing unauthorized access beyond the intended application constraints.

Affected software includes ScaleFusion version 10.5.2, with updates to version 10.5.7 recommended. Key mitigation measures include adhering to the identified strategies M1050, M1051, and M1048 to reinforce security configurations and apply necessary updates to prevent exploitation.
